textByHash.216b15f678625a120bec1ed9602074708ee868cd: What colour dye do you want? I can make you blue, red or yellow dyes for you. If you bring me the correct raw materials.
textByHash.2f91e34cb037b5b91a6e800d9f28d140079c201b: No silly, it's someone who deals with preservatives and dyes. I didn't really enjoy the preservative side of things so I've chosen to deal solely in dyeing.
textByHash.4b4e5bc651400491b0057766a1a9e0a2842c58a4: Well, it's quite simple really my mother was a drysalter and I learnt the trade from her.
textByHash.52276883cdbf88764f746b88ba3bf8b8353e43f2: Well I know for sure that the desert climate wouldn't suit them. I have mine picked for me in the woods south of Varrock.
textByHash.54b4f672326d77b0d7600172eaa77baa0167080f: Generally you would find onions in vegetable gardens, silly.
textByHash.5c134f31a23f811a3756ba204459c2b382d70e4f: I really don't know. A friend of mine grows hers on a farms near Draynor village. But that's a little far from here to be useful.
textByHash.82062ab880837d4548e4757c6c952de9f1bd0017: You know what you need to get, now come back when you have them. Goodbye for now.
textByHash.8cd56385c74cffa7d30991d6d8a4b86f1e73ae4f: Woad leaves are fairly rare. My other customers tell me there's a gardener in Falador who grows them.
textByHash.8daad45e36e8d39a602092ffa72e9ec69fd638e2: Thanks. But really, it's not the best around here, nearly everyone in this town wears only white, which means I don't exactly do a roaring trade. Now is there anything I can get you?
textByHash.90a4e45c32987e52eb0cc90e2df5f1f0d94e19c1: Why thank you. Can I help you with anything?
textByHash.9aef59da23a202fecaa156199058e6bde2a3441e: Well you could try growing them. They shouldn't be too hard to grow.
textByHash.b2a8fd8826522cf693fa27abc64aac8f254f59d2: It's a dyeing trade! Oh gosh, I'm sorry, that was a truly dreadful joke.
textByHash.b43b906842d77f1b86c9aede99445e75a64a4859: Yellow is an awkward colour to recreate, I guess if you got me 2 onions I could use their skins to make a warm yellow dye for you. Oh yes and lest I forget I'll need 25 coins to cover the cost of the glass ware and
textByHash.b7dfbe55966b55560c95dae6a3bb91498352ce7f: To make a bottle of blue dye I'll need 2 woad leaves and 25 coins from you.
textByHash.d1d7c3df4a9b7bd4e8a2d7685015d3868cba53c7: Hmm.... 3 lots of redberries should do the trick and 25 coins should cover any other costs.
textByHash.d8cd98428914f5de59dbde9467db40d5bfc10909: Fair enough, I still think that the price is fairly reasonable considering that I'm the only source of dye this side of the Shantay pass.
